claim: The gathered evidence from explorer and cross-checker is sufficient to support PRD readiness. No assumptions are presented as facts, all evidence paths are usable with repo-relative paths and line numbers, and there is no unresolved missing data.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function independently verified by both explorer and cross-checker with exact line numbers
evidence.why: Confirms evidence precision and reproducibility across independent agents

evidence.summary: Test coverage validated by both agents demonstrates blocking behavior is tested
evidence.why: Shows implementation evidence is validated by test evidence

evidence.summary: Cross-checker found consistent filtering logic in separate file reinforcing explorer's findings
evidence.why: Demonstrates evidence agreement across multiple code locations

evidence.summary: Current demand status shows blockers list still contains evidence agent requirements
evidence.why: Confirms verification is happening in correct state context

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is complete, precise, and in agreement. Both agents independently verified the same blocking logic paths with consistent line numbers and sources. All evidence is project-scoped from code and tests with usable paths. No assumptions promoted to facts. No missing data remains unaddressed. Evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness validation.
